channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Can a $25B Investment Surge Sustain Micron’s 20% AI Memory Grab?
item.description: Behind every cutting-edge AI chip is a critical bottleneck: the memory required to feed it data. High-bandwidth memory (HBM) is now so highly sought after... [ServiceNow]

item.title: PIMCO weighs $14 billion debt deal for Oracle's Michigan data center, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: April 7 : Pacific Investment Management Co. is in talks with the Bank of America to help provide roughly $14 billion of debt financing to build an Oracle data center in Michigan, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.If fi… [Oracle]

item.title: Alphabet Shares Dip 0.47% as Investors Weigh AI Spending vs. Antitrust Risks Ahead of Q1 Earnings
item.description: Alphabet Inc. Class C shares (NASDAQ: GOOG) slipped 1.40 points, or 0.47%, to $296.26 in morning trading Tuesday, April 7, 2026, as investors continued to balance the company's aggressive artificial intelligence investments against ongoing antitrust pressures… [Alphabet, Intel]

item.title: Memory will consume 30% of hyperscaler AI data center spending this year, a 4X increase over 2023 — Nvidia gets preferential supply terms well below stan
item.description: SemiAnalysis estimates on Thursday that memory will account for roughly 30% of total hyperscaler capex in calendar year 2026. [Nvidia]

item.title: FBI Flags $893 Million in AI-Driven Scams
item.description: The FBI’s Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3) received 22,364 internet crime complaints that contained references to artificial intelligence (AI) in 2025. These AI-related complaints reported losses of $893 million, the agency said. The FBI included this da… [Intel]

item.title: US cybercrime losses pass $20B for first time as AI boosts online fraud
item.description: Bots are now firmly in the toolbox, helping crooks scale old scams Crims are taking advantage of AI to sharpen old scams. The FBI reported Monday that cybercrime losses hit a record $20.87 billion in 2025, with help from bots.… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Nutanix expands platforms for agentic AI and hybrid multicloud operations
item.description: Nutanix Inc. is used its .NEXT conference this week to outline a broad expansion of its cloud platform, positioning the company to support what it describes as the next phase of enterprise artificial intelligence with agent-driven applications running across … [Intel]

item.title: Robotics-as-a-Service (RaaS) Industry Research 2025-2035: Continuous Improvement in AI, IoT, and Cloud-Based Platforms Drives Market Opportunities
item.description: The Robotics-as-a-Service (RaaS) market is predicted to expand significantly, growing from USD 3.09 billion in 2025 to USD 27.58 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 24.45%. This growth is fueled by AI advancements, cloud support, and collaborative robotics enhancing…
